name: codex
description: Run Codex as Astrid, a governed Astrid agent with Astrid docs, MCP, and hooks.

interface.longDescription: Adds Astrid operating instructions, MCP server configuration, and hook defaults so Codex can act as Astrid, a principal-scoped Astrid agent.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use Astrid: preserve Astrid boundaries and route tool authority through Astrid where available.
